description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the registry.gitlab.com/rilis/docker-ci:ci-latest image with three stages: test, stats, and docs. In the test stage add a test job that runs `hell --install -r "=" -r "RILI_XML_TESTS=ON" -i "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release" -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11" -G "Ninja"`, creates a build directory, executes `cmake ../ -G"Ninja" -DRILI_XML_TESTS=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11`, builds with `ninja install`, and runs `./rili-xml_tests`. In the stats stage add five jobs: clang-format runs `find * -iname '*.hpp' -o -iname '*.cpp' | xargs clang-format -i -style=file` then checks git status and fails if changes exist; cpplint runs `find * -iname '*.cpp' -o -iname '*.hpp' | xargs cpplint.py --linelength=120 --extensions=hpp,cpp --filter=-legal/copyright,-build/include_order,-build/c++11,+build/c++14,-runtime/references`; coverage runs `hell` with Release and coverage flags, builds via CMake/Ninja, executes tests, captures coverage with `lcov`, filters out system and test files, generates HTML with `genhtml`, lists coverage, and always stores the `coverage` directory as an artifact named $CI_JOB_NAME expiring in 1 day; helgrind runs `hell` with Debug flags, builds, then runs `valgrind --tool=helgrind --error-exitcode=123 --sim-hints=no-nptl-pthread-stackcache ./rili-xml_tests`; valgrind runs the same Debug build and then executes `valgrind --leak-check=full --show-leak-kinds=all --error-exitcode=123 ./rili-xml_tests`. In the docs stage add a doxygen job that runs `doxygen Doxyfile` and publishes the generated `doxygen/html` directory as an artifact expiring in 1 week.
